skills.name: api
skills.description: Implement and extend REST API handlers in `src/api.c` — routing, JSON parsing, response formatting, and wiring new endpoints into `api_handle()`.

skills.name: booking
skills.description: Domain logic for creating, reading, updating, and cancelling bookings in `src/booking.c` — including input validation and conflict detection.

skills.name: build
skills.description: Build the AppBookingResPi4 binary natively (x86_64) and cross-compile for Raspberry Pi 4 (ARMv7), including the embedded HTML step and Makefile targets.

skills.name: deploy-pi
skills.description: Cross-compile and deploy the `appbooking-pi` binary to Raspberry Pi 4 targets via `make deploy` / `make deploy2`, and install the systemd service with `scripts/install-service.sh`.

skills.name: example
skills.description: Describe what this skill covers in one or two sentences. This first sentence is

skills.name: planner-executor-setup
skills.description: Bootstrap the Planner-Executor workflow into any new project so that Claude acts as Planner and GitHub Copilot acts as Executor, with Karpathy principles enforced throughout.

skills.name: storage
skills.description: SQLite3 persistence layer in `src/storage.c` — schema, prepared statements, and all booking CRUD operations against the database.

skills.name: web-ui
skills.description: Design and edit the embedded web dashboard (`web/index.html`, `web/admin.html`) using the local Sneat admin template as reference, embed vendor CSS/JS assets via xxd, extend `src/web.c` routes, and update Makefile rules.
